items.title: I'm moving on from @Google.
items.description: I'm moving on from @Google. I had the privilege of helping build two businesses from zero: first across Search & Ads, then Gemini. Three years ago, OpenAI and Anthropic were in the lead. We built what it took to compete: the playbook for b…
items.description_zh: 我将从@Google 离职。我有幸帮助从零开始建立两项业务：首先是搜索和广告，然后是 Gemini。三年前，OpenAI 和 Anthropic 处于领先地位。我们构建了竞争所需的一切：b 的剧本……

meta.bio: Product Leader at Google - Gemini, Veo, Nano Banana. All opinions mine.

items.title: When AI makes one thing easy to do, it’s always good to assume that will equally be the c…
items.title_zh: 当人工智能让一件事变得容易做时，最好假设它同样会成为......
items.description: When AI makes one thing easy to do, it’s always good to assume that will equally be the case for everyone else. If it’s the case for everyone else, then that means competitive forces will ensure that resources move to new or other areas th…
items.description_zh: 当人工智能让一件事变得容易做时，最好假设其他人也同样如此。如果其他人都是这种情况，那么这意味着竞争力量将确保资源转移到新的或其他领域……

items.title: GBrain also just added thin-client mode!
items.title_zh: GBrain 还刚刚添加了瘦客户端模式！
items.description: GBrain also just added thin-client mode! So your Claude Code, or secondary agent (Hermes if you use Claw as primary or vice versa) doesn't have to run its own MCP server, it can just use GBrain over MCP as a thin client! https://t.co/jjV7q…
items.description_zh: GBrain 还刚刚添加了瘦客户端模式！因此，您的 Claude Code 或辅助代理（Hermes，如果您使用 Claw 作为主要代理，反之亦然）不必运行自己的 MCP 服务器，它可以仅使用 MCP 上的 GBrain 作为瘦客户端！ https://t.co/jjV7q…

items.title: GStack is my own personal Claude Code setup that is also quite useful with OpenClaw/Herme…
items.title_zh: GStack 是我个人的 Claude Code 设置，对于 OpenClaw/Herme 也非常有用……
items.description: GStack is my own personal Claude Code setup that is also quite useful with OpenClaw/Hermes for web interaction You can run it in headed mode on your Mac/PC and run /pair-agent to let your Claw/Hermes control your browser with full logins v…
items.description_zh: GStack 是我个人的 Claude 代码设置，对于 OpenClaw/Hermes 的 Web 交互也非常有用。您可以在 Mac/PC 上以 head 模式运行它，并运行 /pair-agent 让您的 Claw/Hermes 通过完全登录来控制您的浏览器…

items.title: Just dropped GStack v1.28 GStack Browser can now download items, and run in headed config…
items.title_zh: 刚刚发布的 GStack v1.28 GStack 浏览器现在可以下载项目，并在 head config 中运行...
items.description: Just dropped GStack v1.28 GStack Browser can now download items, and run in headed configuration mode with anti-bot detection in using Xvfb on headless Linux containers (like your claw/hermes) Added llms.txt so agents of all kinds can use…
items.description_zh: 刚刚删除了 GStack v1.28 GStack 浏览器现在可以下载项目，并在无头 Linux 容器（如您的 Claw/hermes）上使用 Xvfb 时以有头配置模式运行，并具有反机器人检测功能添加了 llms.txt，以便各种代理可以使用...
